name: Adam vs Sacha
description: While Adam and Sacha were best friends, they got into a fight and as a result, they tried to destroy each other. To do this, they collected weapons falling from the air on three different maps and shot each other.
instructions: W A D for Sacha movement Arrow keys for Adam movement Mobile touch screen button
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Action, Adventure, amazing, Arcade, Best, Best Games, Gun, Shoot, Shooter, Shooting
